name: bahamut-post
description: Create, rewrite, convert, and repair Traditional Chinese Bahamut forum posts using editor-safe source markup.

interface.shortDescription: Create Bahamut-ready Traditional Chinese forum posts
interface.longDescription: Draft, rewrite, or convert articles into Bahamut/Gamer.com.tw source-mode markup while preserving safe tag nesting, line breaks, lists, commands, and links.
defaultPrompt: Convert this article into Bahamut source-mode markup.
Rewrite this draft as a Traditional Chinese Bahamut post.
Repair the line breaks and tags in this Bahamut post.
